entities.name: prāṇa
entities.cite: The breath ascends carrying the undivided word

entities.name: śabda
entities.cite: The breath ascends carrying the undivided word

entities.name: granthi
entities.cite: The knots (granthi, the Vrtti's own word for the involutions of 1.1) are the word's condensed unity as lodged in the moving prana

entities.name: varṇa
entities.cite: the breath, varnan abhivyajya, having manifested the phonemes

axioms.name: vahati
axioms.cite: The breath ascends carrying the undivided word

axioms.name: vibhajati
axioms.cite: The knots (granthi, the Vrtti's own word for the involutions of 1.1) are the word's condensed unity as lodged in the moving prana; articulation unties them into sruti-rupaih prthagvidhaih, the differentiated audible forms

axioms.name: abhivyajati
axioms.cite: the breath, varnan abhivyajya, having manifested the phonemes, varnesv eva upaliyate — dissolves into those very phonemes

axioms.name: upaliyate
axioms.cite: the breath, varnan abhivyajya, having manifested the phonemes, varnesv eva upaliyate — dissolves into those very phonemes

axioms.name: prthagvidha
axioms.cite: articulation unties them into sruti-rupaih prthagvidhaih, the differentiated audible forms

denials.name: guhyavastha
denials.cite: The carrier does not survive its delivery; prana spends itself utterly into what it manifests, as if the messenger became the message's letters

claims.name: abhivyajati
claims.cite: the breath, having manifested the phonemes

claims.name: prthagvidha
claims.cite: the differentiated forms of audible sound

rejected_readings.label: prana_persists_hidden
rejected_readings.rendering: The breath, having manifested the phonemes, remains concealed within those very phonemes.
rejected_readings.why: Contradicts the commentary's core assertion that the carrier does not survive delivery. The verse emphasizes total consumption (upaliyate as 'dissolves into'), not latent persistence ('merges/hides within'), which the contested note identifies as the less supported reading.

rejected_readings.label: granthi_as_final_product
rejected_readings.rendering: The breath divides itself into the knots of audible sound, which then dissolve into the phonemes.
rejected_readings.why: Mistakes granthi (the word's condensed form as lodged in prana) for an intermediate product. Granthi is not a separate phonetic entity but the unified form before articulation; the phonemes (varna) are the sole final product of manifestation. This reverses the ontological structure: granthi is predicate to vibhajati, not object.

notes: The contract encodes the production-side sequence: prana carries sabda, divides granthi at articulation sites, manifests varna as differentiated forms, and dissolves utterly into them. The 'dissolution' is specifically rejection of any latent persistence (the 'merges/hides within' reading of upaliyate). The verse's cosmological force—'the one, descending into difference, is wholly in the difference, nothing held back'—is captured by the asymmetry between prana's complete consumption and sabda's inexhaustibility (addressed by the next verse).
